features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to look professional — no hassle

items.templatesDesc: Pick from beautifully designed templates. Your portfolio will look like you hired a pro.
items.instantOnline: Go live the moment you're ready
items.instantOnlineDesc: No waiting, no approval needed. Your portfolio is live the instant you hit publish.
items.fastDesc: Fill in your info, pick a template, hit publish. Done. Really fast.
items.editable: Edit anytime, as much as you want
items.editableDesc: Add new projects, change photos, update your bio — edit whenever you like.
items.easy: If you can use Facebook, you can use this
items.easyDesc: No code, no complex menus. Point, click, type, done.
items.shareLink: One link. No more PDF attachments
items.shareLinkDesc: A single portfolio link you can send in email, messages, or job applications.

quotes.q1: I was scared it would be complicated. Finished in 10 minutes.
quotes.q2: Applied for jobs for a year with no calls. Made a portfolio, got 3 interviews the next week.
quotes.q3: No more attaching PDFs every time. Just share one link.
